creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

yes, good idea. 
submit it as a patch, (mkdir -p /tmp/old/files ; rsync -av * /tmp/old/; touch /tmp/old/files/freerrpd.sh.in 
put you GENERIC PATCH rc script in ./files/freerrpd.sh.in 
Doesn't need a portsbump. 
do a diff -Bbru > patch.txt 
and, look at this FAQ 
<http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/rc-scripts.html> 
and other scripts from ports to see the %%VARIABLE%% lines needed.
